perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a person wearing a large, colorful lion dance head pillow performing an energetic dance in a warehouse aisle. A large Costco logo is superimposed at the top. (2) The scene cuts to two young women standing in the aisle, each holding a lion head pillow—one predominantly red and gold, the other multi-colored. They speak enthusiastically to the camera, smiling and gesturing. (3) They demonstrate a feature of the pillows where hands can be inserted into the sides, acting out a playful 'lion dance' movement with the pillows. (4) The women continue to present the pillows with high energy, ending with a celebratory pose as various festive text bubbles appear around them.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy traditional Chinese festive percussion music (drums and cymbals) plays immediately, mimicking a lion dance performance. No vocals are present. (2) The music volume lowers as two female voices enter, speaking in a high-pitched, excited, and friendly tone in Mandarin. They are describing the product's price and feel. (3) The rhythmic percussion music continues in the background throughout the rest of the video, interspersed with cartoonish 'pop' and 'ting' sound effects that coincide with on-screen text appearances. (4) Ambient warehouse noise is minimal and suppressed by the studio-quality vocal recording and BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo; '醒獅抱枕 699元' (Lion Dance Pillow 699 NTD); '一個金 一個紅' (One gold, one red); '699元1個'. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '咚咚鏘' (Drums and Cymbals onomatopoeia) appearing in multiple vibrant bubbles; '太旺了吧!' (So prosperous/hot!); '觸感也滿好的' (The feel is also quite good); '突然就想要跳醒獅' (Suddenly want to do a lion dance); '適合拜年' (Suitable for New Year greetings); '給我紅包!' (Give me red envelopes!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Lion Dance) -> Product Introduction -> Feature Demonstration -> Festive Closing

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female presenters appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black puff-sleeve top and a black pleated skirt; the other wears a purple knitted sweater and a grey patterned fluffy bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse store aisle (Costco) with high metal industrial shelving units stacked with boxes of bedding and home goods, specifically branded 'Ashler China'.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional product showcase designed to drive sales for a specific seasonal item (Lion Dance pillows) at Costco. It uses a high-energy 'hook' (dancing with the product) to grab attention, followed by a detailed review of the product's price, texture, and playful features (hand pockets), all while leveraging the festive atmosphere of the Lunar New Year to appeal to consumers' cultural sentiments.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the store (Costco), shows the price tag, and demonstrates the product features to encourage purchase.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density traditional Chinese text bubbles and festive percussion music synchronized with movement.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The content is highly optimized for short-video platforms like TikTok or Instagram Reels, focusing on seasonal trends and value-for-money warehouse shopping finds.
